text.message: i dont think im the solo?
like why am i soloed rn

ok if were behind, lets trade
cuz im blocked and more behind than you
but i have to ask 2 for the others
we should help each other, not make it harder
my wheat is super precious though
doesnt have to be sheep lol
can you let everyone play their game please
you just had a 10 ore mono blue lol
green and blue are clearly leading
black i thought we talked about even trades
yes but that trade doesnt help
red do you just expect everything to go your way?
no but these trades seem mutually beneficial
its not beneficial when I make brick
or else they would have won
I think they win with road.
then what do you got lol
At 10 cards. You could’ve hit then
if i didnt take road, youd win
i dont know how else to explain this
u need to play some devs then
u were sitting on 3 non knights for so long

i have to port my entire hand
